prestazioni: OM654 2.0L 4-cylinder diesel (200-258 HP) forced induction upgrade via BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger (1.05 A/R, 62mm compressor wheel) with custom 3.5" V-band downpipe and custom intercooler piping routed through the front bumper ducting for optimized airflow

Full 3.0L OM642 V6 diesel (258-313 HP) Stage 2 ECU remap by Dimsport Genius with upgraded fuel system: 1,000cc/min Bosch Motorsport injectors, high-pressure CP3 pump, and custom 3" stainless steel exhaust with Akrapovič 70mm titanium tips and bypass valves for backpressure reduction

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and preload), custom-valved for the V-Class W447 platform, paired with H&R 30mm front and 25mm rear anti-roll bars and polyamide bushings for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V-Wide V-Class W447 body kit (front bumper, side skirts, rear diffuser, and overfenders) with custom carbon fiber lip spoiler and 3M Matte Graphite Grey vinyl wrap
OEM+ AMG Line grille with custom laser-cut stainless steel mesh (0.8mm thickness) and smoked LED DRLs from Osram Night Breaker Laser, paired with Hella 500 FF fog lights with yellow tinted lenses

BBS CH-R 20x9.5" ET25 forged wheels with 245/35R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, custom center caps with Mercedes-Benz star cutouts, and 6-piston Alcon front brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating design) and Ferodo DS2500 pads
